title: masdevallia × urbanae
intro: Masdevallia × urbanae, also known as the Urbana orchid, is a hybrid plant species within the orchid family, resulting from the cross between Masdevallia veitchiana and Masdevallia veitchiana var. flavibasis. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Masdevallia × urbanae include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its safety and efficacy for human consumption.
